seoTitle: How to Make T-Shirt Mockups in Canva Easily
metaDescription: Create professional t-shirt mockups in Canva by choosing a template, customizing your design, and exporting for marketing or online stores.
intro: A convincing t-shirt mockup helps customers picture the finished product before they buy, and Canva offers a straightforward way to build one without advanced design skills. This guide covers selecting a mockup template, customizing it with your artwork, and exporting the result. It's aimed at entrepreneurs, fashion designers, and small business owners preparing apparel for sale.

steps.heading: Choose a t-shirt mockup template
steps.body: Browse Canva's mockup options and pick one that matches the style you're going for.

steps.heading: Customize your design
steps.body: Add your graphics or text onto the mockup template, adjusting placement and size as needed.

steps.heading: Refine the details
steps.body: Check colors, proportions, and overall look before finalizing the mockup.

steps.heading: Export for marketing use
steps.body: Download the finished mockup to use in your online store, social posts, or promotional materials.

faq.question: Do I need design skills to make a t-shirt mockup in Canva?
faq.answer: No, the templates are built for non-designers, so you mainly need your artwork or text ready to drop in.

faq.question: Can I use these mockups for an online store listing?
faq.answer: Yes, exported mockups are commonly used as product images for e-commerce listings and marketing posts.

faq.question: Can I make mockups in multiple colors?
faq.answer: Yes, you can duplicate the design and adjust the shirt color for each version you need.
